title: T-035 — Seed downtime_categories with 10 Apex 4P+1M categories
prompt:
# T-035 — Seed downtime_categories

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §6 D6, §16.5 [APEX-CONFIG]

## Goal
Seed Apex's 10 default downtime categories per §6 D6 mapped to lean 6 Big Losses (People/Process/Plant) into the 02-SETTINGS-owned downtime_categories table.

## Implementation contract
Create seeds/production/downtime-categories-apex.ts with array of 10 rows: People (operator_break, operator_missing, training); Process (material_wait, upstream_delay, downstream_blocked, quality_hold); Plant (machine_fault, cleaning, changeover). Each row {code, name, lean_loss_class:'people'|'process'|'plant', is_active:true, sort_order, tenant_id:'apex'}. Add seed runner script packages/db/seeds/run-production-seeds.ts that idempotently INSERTs ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, code) DO NOTHING. Add unit test asserting 10 rows seeded after script run.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/seeds/production/downtime-categories-apex.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/run-production-seeds.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/__tests__/downtime-categories-seed.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given seed runner runs first time, when SELECT count(*) FROM downtime_categories WHERE tenant_id='apex', then count=10
2. Given seed runner runs twice, when count queried again, then still 10 (idempotent ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
3. Given seed runner completes, when SELECT lean_loss_class GROUP BY runs, then result includes 3 'people', 4 'process', 3 'plant' rows

## Test strategy
- RED: seed test asserting 10 rows + idempotency + class distribution before seed file exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db test downtime-categories-seed'

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify downtime_categories schema (02-SETTINGS owns)
- Do not seed without tenant_id (would leak to other tenants)
- Do not use UPDATE on conflict (categories may be tenant-customized)

pipeline_inputs.description: Seed Apex 10 downtime categories mapped to 6BL across People/Process/Plant.
pipeline_inputs.details: Idempotent seed script with INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. tenant_id='apex'. lean_loss_class enum {people, process, plant}. Categories per §6 D6.
out_of_scope: Do not seed for other tenants
Do not implement category admin UI
acceptance_criteria: Given first seed run, when count rows for tenant=apex, then count=10
Given seed runs twice, when count queried, then still 10 (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
Given complete seed, when GROUP BY lean_loss_class, then 3 people + 4 process + 3 plant
test_strategy: RED: seed test asserting 10+idempotent+distribution before seed exists
